results.rendered_html: antaḥ—karaṇa n. the internal organ, the seat of thought and feeling, the mind, the thinking faculty, the heart, the conscience, the soul.

results.rendered_html: antaḥkaraṇa (antar + karaṇa) n. das innere Organ, das Herz, der Geist  TRIK. 1,1,114 .  H. 1369 . sarveṣu gātreṣu sahāntaḥkaraṇeṣu ca  R. 6,82,29 . satāṃ hi saṃdehapadeṣu vastuṣu pramāṇamantaḥkaraṇapravṛttayaḥ (die Regungen des Herzens)  ŚĀK. 21 . ataḥ khalu sabāhyāntaḥkaraṇo mamāntarātmā prasīdati 98,21 . dayārdrabhāvamākhyātamantaḥkaraṇairviśaṅkaiḥ [Page1-0236] (hariṇīnām)  RAGH. 2,11 . antaḥkaraṇaṃ trividham (Sch.: buddhyahaṃkāramanāṃsi)  SĀṂKHYAK. 33 . sāntaḥkaraṇā (Sch.: ahaṃkāramanaḥsahitā) buddhiḥ 35 . dhīstu dvidhā matā . ekāhaṃkṛtiranyā syādantaḥkaraṇarūpiṇī  BĀLAB. 6 .
